impact: This advances the PP&D DevHub guardrail plan by fixture-validating how mocked Playwright interactions are classified before any browser automation, with consequential and financial paths stopped by false exact-confirmation defaults.
summary: Add a deterministic Playwright action-classification fixture and validation test for mocked DevHub form interactions.
target_task: Task checkbox-76: Task checkbox-71: Add a Playwright action-classification fixture that maps mocked form interactions to read-only, reversible draft-edit, consequential, and financial classes, with exact-confirmation defaults set to false.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
